engagement_notes: Example materials file — used for CI validation and dry-run testing. See docs/MATERIALS_JSON_CONTRACT.md for schema reference.

company_fundamentals.business_model: Contingency and retained recruitment for financial services and fintech sectors

strategic_context.primary_growth_goal: Grow revenue 25% in FY2026 without adding headcount
key_risks: CRM data quality blocking AI adoption
strategic_context.planned_investments: ATS upgrade from Bullhorn to Vincere scheduled Q2 2026

pain_points.top_pain_point: Manual candidate sourcing takes 6–8 hours per mandate
pain_points.second_pain_point: Client status reporting is manual and inconsistent — consultants spend 3–4 hours per week on it
pain_points.other_pain_points: CV formatting takes 45 minutes per candidate; candidate follow-up falls through cracks; no structured debriefs after placements
pain_points.impact_estimate: Estimated 30% of consultant time is non-billable admin

technology.ats: Vincere (migrating from Bullhorn — migration due Q2 2026)
technology.ai_tools_currently_used: None formally; some consultants use ChatGPT ad hoc without company policy

people_culture.ai_readiness_self_assessment: 3/5 — team is open but cautious; some resistance from senior consultants concerned about job security
people_culture.change_sponsor: CEO (Sara Georgieva) is the AI champion with board backing

data_readiness.crm_data_quality: Poor — many duplicate records, inconsistent tagging, gaps in contact history
data_readiness.candidate_data_structured: Partially — CVs stored as PDFs, not parsed into structured fields
data_readiness.historical_data_available: 5 years of placement data in Bullhorn; quality varies by year
data_readiness.gdpr_compliance: Basic — GDPR policy exists but not fully enforced across all consultants
data_readiness.data_governance_owner: No dedicated owner; responsibility shared informally between operations manager and IT

budget_timeline.timeline_preference: First visible results within 6 months; phased investment preferred
budget_timeline.decision_maker: CEO and CFO joint sign-off required for expenditure above EUR 10,000
budget_timeline.preferred_engagement_model: Prove value in a small pilot before scaling across the team

documents.name: FY2025 Financial Summary
documents.notes: Management accounts — audited accounts not yet available for FY2025
